word: H1740 - דּוּחַ - dûwach - doo'-akh - Cast out

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּוּח

Transliteration: dûach

Phonetic: doo'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. to rinse, cleanse away by rinsing, cast out, purge, wash, washing
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to rinse
      2. to cleanse (by washing) (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 412

Part(s) of speech: Verb
